/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -g -O2 -ffile-prefix-map=/home/merve/ros2_ws/src/yolo26_interfaces=. -flto=auto -ffat-lto-objects -flto=auto -ffat-lto-objects -fstack-protector-strong -Wformat -Werror=format-security -Wdate-time -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -shared -Wl,-soname,libyolo26_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libyolo26_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/yolo26_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/yolo26_interfaces/msg/detail/yolo_detection__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/yolo26_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/yolo26_interfaces/msg/detail/yolo_detection_array__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
